2157900.name: Deadly Night Soundtrack
2157900.description:
The Deadly Night Soundtrack includes a collection of 12 original tracks from the game, composed by Manuel Molano and Daniel Hren.

Deadly Night is a stealth-driven, grindhouse style slasher game. Featuring low poly, PS1 style visuals – prepare to feel helpless as you are stalked by a relentless killer!

Alone and afraid in a remote roadside motel; leered at and lusted after by fiends and weirdos - but if only you knew this was just the beginning of the terror. Soon, no one is safe; and soon, everyone is going to die…unless you can avoid and outwit your bloodthirsty pursuer…
